reviews.review_description:
I honestly bought this thinking it's a puzzle game. I mean it's somewhat of puzzle game but not really. 

The gameplay loop is about finding the right angle at which a collection shredded paper form a specific picture. 

The game has lots of levels which I like. The dialogues are a bit too fast to read. The tries to be charming but struggling due to the limited variability in gameplay and the connectedness of it's different parts.

I'm really grateful that they didn’t give up on this game and kept fixing the bugs.

One more thing I'd like to add: It would be great if we could find the game when searching for 'The Little Prince.'

developer_response.body: Sorry to keep you waiting so long. Thank you so much for still enjoying our game. And I will forward the comments you mentioned to the development team. Thank you again from the bottom of my heart.

reviews.review_description:
Issue fixed. Old users: Need to uninstall and reinstall. Now I am enjoying this amazing app. Old comments left for context.

Hi Dev: The game cannot get past level 7. Seems a simple fix on the locks to all levels is needed. (Problem seems to be that every level gets locked as we move through the intro levels 1-7, then it won’t advance to unlock later levels.)
Will change the rating to 5-star when this is fixed.
Feel bad for you that no one can appreciate the 100+ levels of beautiful art via your hard work, simply because they are locked behind a software bug.

developer_response.body: We are very sorry to have kept you waiting so long. Please feel free to enjoy the game now.

reviews.review_description:
I’m glad to see the dev brought this down to $9.99. 

It’s definitely a relaxing game. Not very challenging as i can create most items w 2-3 star ratings. However, the music is really lovely and it’s a decent time killer.

I definitely think the dev would be helped out by having a preview video for this app. It’s rare to see an app without one.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your valuable opinion.
We will prepare the information so that it can be reflected later.
-Newmatic-
